command: HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1 poetry run python scripts/agent/evals/run_local_tool_call_eval.py --model-role fallback --repeat-count 3 --output-dir artifacts/agent_evals/local_fallback

gate_policy.fast_dev_gate: deterministic eval, changed or failed cases only, repeat 1, no fallback model
gate_policy.candidate_gate: primary model, affected case families, repeat 1 or 2
gate_policy.release_thesis_gate: deterministic full suite, primary full suite x3, fallback full suite x3, dashboard refresh, resource pressure recorded
